text:
Avail (アベイル, Abeiru) is a fashion brand founded by the retailer SHIMAMURA Co., Ltd. that held a collaboration with the Hunter × Hunter series.

Information

The first collaboration merchandise was released on June 11, 2022. The second collaboration merchandise was released on November 12, 2022.

Collaboration Characters

Gon Freecss
Killua Zoldyck
Kurapika
Leorio Paradinight
Hisoka Morow
Phantom Troupe
